title: Avoid using Class.forName() to load JDBC 4.0+ drivers
description: This rule raises an issue when Class.forName() is used with one of the following values, as it can lead to security vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Remove the Class.forName() call and let the JDBC driver be automatically loaded.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities due to the use of Class.forName() with JDBC 4.0+ drivers.

checks.message: Rule: Avoid using Class.forName() to load JDBC 4.0+ drivers
